title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SigTuple - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
